item.title: Brent crude to average $115 a barrel in second quarter amid Middle East shut-ins: EIA
item.description: Output cuts could rise to 9.1 million barrels per day in April

item.title: US LNG developer seals offtake contracts as final investment decision looms
item.description: Commonwealth LNG says customers include EQT, Petronas, Aramco

item.title: Louisiana governor sees progress on carbon capture well permits after application pause
item.description: Jeff Landry says three more Class VI authorisations possible by end of 2026

item.title: Touchstone aims to quadruple production after ‘wiping out’ competition in Trinidad & Tobago
item.description: Chief executive Paul Baay tells Upstream the Canadian independent seeks to achieve output of 20,000 boepd

item.title: Seadrill wins $480 million rig contract extension with Petrobras
item.description: Drillship West Polaris will continue drilling offshore Brazil until early 2031

item.title: Key details revealed as Argentina LNG progresses towards end-of-year FID
item.description: YPC CEO told Upstream economics will make project resilient against market volatility

item.title: Eni makes big gas and condensate find in East Mediterranean
item.description: Denise West discovery estimated to hold 2 Tcf of gas and 130 million barrels of liquids

item.title: ExxonMobil gears up for major new Cyprus gas project
item.description: Declaration of commerciality filed for Glaucus and Pegasus discoveries, with appraisal plans afoot

item.title: UK North Sea operator making moves to secure rig requirements
item.description: Harbour has Paul B Loyd on contract with multiple options

item.title: BP and Adnoc invest $500 million in new Egypt gas project
item.description: Arcius Energy joint venture make move on 200 million cubic foot per day development

item.title: Nigeria boosts gas reserves as oil volumes slip
item.description: Upstream regulator reports approximate 5 Tcf rise in gas resources over past year

item.title: All smiles as latest Norwegian project comes on stream
item.description: Symra field is developing gross resource of 63 million barrels of oil equivalent

item.title: Chevron resumes Leviathan gas production offshore Israel
item.description: Host government had ordered asset to be shut in amid Middle East conflict

item.title: War flips the script at OTC Asia as unease shifts energy priorities
item.description: Geopolitics and 'how we convert the current environment to opportunity' were front of mind for delegates at OTC Asia

item.title: Missile strike sparks fire at Saudi Arabia’s strategic energy hub, 'damage assessment' ongoing
item.description: The massive Jubail industrial complex is home to several energy and industrial facilities, with the state giant Aramco holding a key share in some of the strategic assets

item.title: Missile strike sparks fire at Saudi energy hub, 'damage assessment' ongoing
item.description: Massive Jubail industrial complex hosts several energy and industrial facilities, with state giant Aramco holding a key share in some of the assets

item.title: TotalEnergies and Petronas step up oil search in PNG, Sabah
item.description: French supermajor expected to soon acquire more assets to boost Malaysia upstream portfolio

item.title: Timor-Leste improves commercial terms for 2027 bid round
item.description: Nation ‘actively welcomes investment and is pursuing major reform’, says regulator ANP

item.title: US operator names new CFO months after previous executive’s departure
item.description: Expand Energy taps Parkland’s Marcel Teunissen to fill major role after Mohit Singh’s ‘termination without cause’

item.title: US to merge offshore regulators split by BP Deepwater Horizon disaster
item.description: Move would reintegrate law enforcement and industrial promotion, which were separated by Obama following worst oil spill in US history

item.title: Valaris secures $450 million contract extension for drillship offshore Brazil
item.description: New charter with Petrobras will commence in November 2027

item.title: Israel strikes petrochemical plant at Iran’s South Pars complex
item.description: Natural gas field was target of previous strikes in March

item.title: Petronas teams up with Valaris and Halliburton for Suriname projects
item.description: Agreement establishes collaborative framework across project's entire lifecycle

item.title: Brazilian driller wins $600 million rig contract extensions with Petrobras
item.description: Ventura Offshore to keep two rigs working for longer in Brazil

item.title: Attack on UAE’s largest gas facility leaves one dead, 'significant damages'
item.description: Adnoc Gas' Habshan complex in southwestern Abu Dhabi is one of the largest gas processing facilities in the world

item.title: Attack on Adnoc's largest gas facility leaves one dead, 'significant damages'
item.description: Adnoc Gas' Habshan complex in southwestern Abu Dhabi is one of the largest gas processing facilities in the world

item.title: Attack on Adnoc's largest gas facility leaves one dead and 'significant damage'
item.description: Adnoc Gas' Habshan complex in southwest Abu Dhabi is one of the largest gas processing facilities in the world

item.title: Blaze on ONGC offshore platform injures at least 10
item.description: Mumbai High is India’s largest offshore oil and gas asset, delivering more than 25% of domestic oil output

item.title: India offers more exploration acreage, including ultra-deepwater blocks
item.description: Bid submissions for OALP-XI due on same date as previous round after that deadline postponed four times

item.title: Lion secures rig for game-changing offshore wildcat
item.description: ASX-listed operator plans in July to spud Bula Karang-1 well offshore Indonesia
